calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-22-2008 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-22-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on WED-OCT-22-2008: Howard Newson Chung, attorney for plaintiff Steve Wong Trustee of the James Y. Wong Bypass Trust, who is also present; Khanh Nguyen, counsel by limited scope representation for defendant Luis Cuandros, who is also present

Settlement conference held. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed with the Court. See scanned document for settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located at 2927 Irving Street, City and County of San Francisco, California 94122.
The OCT-27-2008 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk L. Fong, Not Reported (218)
